zh.Skirpenbeck, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾斯吉朋貝可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Hodgson於大約1560年出生在英國時，她的父親William Hodgson37歲，母親Lady Rachel Wilkinson33歲。她於1581年與William Thomas Bennett在英國藍卡爾吉可哈姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1625年8月2日在英國斯塔福爾瑟格利享年66歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.Skirpenbeck, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾斯吉朋貝可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Hodgson于大约1560年出生在英国时，她的父亲William Hodgson37岁，母亲Lady Rachel Wilkinson33岁。她于1581年与William Thomas Bennett在英国藍卡爾吉可哈姆结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1625年8月2日在英国斯塔福爾瑟格利享年66岁，埋葬在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Hodgson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): from the Middle English personal name Hodge + -son.

variants.name: Hodge
meanings: English (Norfolk and Suffolk): from the Middle English personal name Hogge, a rhyming pet form of Roger . In The Canterbury Tales, Chaucer's cook, ‘highte Hogge of Ware’, is invoked ‘Now tell on, Roger …’. Since Middle English spellings of the personal name are often impossible to distinguish from the nickname Hog(ge) ‘hog’, some early examples may be variants of Hogg .

variants.name: Hodgin
meanings: shortened form of   Hodgson   with assimilation of /s/ to the preceding consonant.
perhaps from the rare Middle English personal name Hogin, a diminutive of Hodge , though this has not yet been found in northern England.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Hodgson was born about 1560, in England, her father, William Hodgson, was 37 and her mother, Lady Rachel Wilkinson, was 33. She married William Thomas Bennett in 1581, in Kirkham, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 2 August 1625, in Sedgley, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 66, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Hodgson est née environ 1560, à Angleterre, son père, William Hodgson, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Lady Rachel Wilkinson, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé William Thomas Bennett en 1581, à Kirkham, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 2 août 1625, à Sedgley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Hodgson um 1560 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Hodgson 37 und ihre Mutter Lady Rachel Wilkinson 33. Sie hat 1581 in Kirkham, Lancashire, England William Thomas Bennett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 2. August 1625 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Sedgley, Staffordshire, England und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Hodgson è nata il circa 1560 nel England, sua padre, William Hodgson, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Lady Rachel Wilkinson, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato William Thomas Bennett nel 1581, nel Kirkham, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 2 agosto 1625, nel Sedgley, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolta a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Hodgsonが約1560年にイギリスで生まれた時，父William Hodgsonは37歳，母Lady Rachel Wilkinsonは33歳であった。1581年にイギリスランカシュアイアキルクハムでWilliam Thomas Bennettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1625年8月2日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアセドグリーで66歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Hodgson(이)가 대략 1560년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Hodgson(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Rachel Wilkinson(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1581년 영국 랭카실르 커크함에서 William Thomas Bennett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1625년 8월 2일 영국 스태퍼드실르 세지리에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Hodgson nasceu aproximadamente 1560, em Inglaterra, seu pai, William Hodgson, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Lady Rachel Wilkinson, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com William Thomas Bennett em 1581, em Kirkham, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 2 de agosto de 1625, em Sedgley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 66 anos, e foi sepultada em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Hodgson родилась около 1560 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени William Hodgson было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Rachel Wilkinson, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Thomas Bennett в 1581 г. в местности кирхам, ланкашир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 2 августа 1625 г. в местности седжли, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Hodgson nació aproximadamente 1560, en Inglaterra, su papá, William Hodgson, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Lady Rachel Wilkinson, tenía 33 años. Se casó con William Thomas Bennett en 1581, en Kirkham, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 2 de agosto de 1625, en Sedgley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultada en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
